name: 手机
shooting_angle: 单物体居中，三分之二或正面产品摄影角度，完整可见
reference_prompt: A standard black smartphone with rectangular screen, made of glass and metal, viewed frontally as a product shot, clean and isolated on white background, no text readable on screen.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:阿彻手中中央；运动政策:阿彻手持从口袋取出并点开屏幕后静止

source_contract.motion_policy: 阿彻手持从口袋取出并点开屏幕后静止
